test_name: 091. Getting a job with an airline

content.en_text: IELTS Listening Version 57262

content.cn_text: 你将听到几段不同的录音，并需要根据所听内容回答问题。
content.en_text: You will hear a number of different recordings, and you will have to answer questions on what
you hear.

content.cn_text: 你会有时间阅读说明和题目，也会有机会
content.en_text: There will be time for you to read the instructions and questions, and you will have a chance to
check your work.
All the recordings will be played once only.
The test is in four sections.

content.cn_text: 请将所有答案写在听力题册上。
content.en_text: Write all your answers in the listening question booklet.

content.cn_text: 考试结束时，你将有十分钟时间把答案誊写到
content.en_text: At the end of the test, you will be given ten minutes to transfer your answers to an
answer sheet.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到题册第2页第一部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section one on page two of your question booklet.
Section one.

content.cn_text: 你将听到一位年轻女士打电话给一位在航空公司工作的朋友，询问关于
content.en_text: You will hear a young woman phoning a friend who works for an airline to ask for advice
about getting a job.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间浏览第2页第1至第5题。
content.en_text: First you have some time to look at questions one to five on page two.

content.cn_text: 你会看到已经为你完成了一个例题。
content.en_text: You will see that there is an example that has been done for you.

content.cn_text: 只有这一次，与例题相关的对话会先播放。
content.en_text: On this occasion only, the conversation relating to this will be played first.
Greg: Hello.
Ellie: Oh, hello.
Oh, hello.
This is Ellie Fisher.
We were at school together.
Greg: Oh, hi, Ellie.
How are you?
What are you doing these days?

content.cn_text: Ellie：其实，我正在找工作，想了解一下申请航空公司的工作，
content.en_text: Ellie: Well, actually, I'm looking for a job, and I was wondering about applying to an airline,

content.cn_text: 就是照顾乘客那类工作。
content.en_text: you know, looking after the passengers.

content.cn_text: 我听说你在做类似的工作。
content.en_text: And I heard you're doing something like that.

content.cn_text: Greg：是的，我现在是客舱乘务员。
content.en_text: Greg: Yeah, I'm working as a cabin crew attendant.

content.cn_text: 提到的工作是 cabin crew attendant，所以空格中已经填入 attendant。
content.en_text: The job mentioned is a cabin crew attendant, so attendant has been written in the space.
Now we shall begin.

content.cn_text: 你需要边听边答题，因为录音不会
content.en_text: You should answer the questions as you listen, because you will not hear the recording a
second time.

content.cn_text: 请仔细听，并回答第1至第5题。
content.en_text: Listen carefully and answer questions one to five.
Greg: Hello.
Ellie: Oh, hello.
This is Ellie Fisher.
We were at school together.
Greg: Oh, hi, Ellie.
How are you?
What are you doing these days?

content.cn_text: Ellie：其实，我正在找工作，想了解一下申请航空公司的工作。
content.en_text: Ellie: Well, actually, I'm looking for a job, and I was wondering about applying to an airline.

content.cn_text: 就是照顾乘客那类工作。
content.en_text: You know, looking after the passengers.

content.cn_text: 我听说你在做类似的工作。
content.en_text: And I heard you're doing something like that.

content.cn_text: Greg：是的，我现在是客舱乘务员。
content.en_text: Greg: Yeah, I'm working as a cabin crew attendant.
Ellie: Right.
So, what does that involve?

content.cn_text: Greg：比如，你可能需要在起飞前给乘客做最初的安全演示。
content.en_text: Greg: Well, you might have to give them the initial safety demonstration before takeoff, for example.
You've probably seen that when you've made a journey by air.

content.cn_text: Ellie：其实我从没坐过飞机，但我很想坐。
content.en_text: Ellie: Actually, I've never flown, but I'd love to.

content.cn_text: 这就是我想在航空公司工作的原因。
content.en_text: That's why I'd like a job with an airline.
Greg: Oh, right.

content.cn_text: 在飞行过程中，你还需要四处询问是否有人想买东西。
content.en_text: And during the flight, you'd also be going round to see if anyone wants to buy anything.
Ellie: So, I'd be dealing with money.
Greg: That's right.
You'd be responsible for that.

content.cn_text: 然后，当然，你还要提供正餐、小吃等。
content.en_text: And then, of course, you'd be serving meals and snacks and things.
Ellie: OK.

content.cn_text: 那任何人都可以申请吗？
content.en_text: So, can anyone apply?
Greg: Well, there are certain requirements.

content.cn_text: 你必须至少19岁，而且还有最低身高要求。
content.en_text: You must be at least 19 years old, and there's also a minimum height.
That's 168 centimeters.

content.cn_text: 这是为了确保你能拿到飞机上较高的储物柜。
content.en_text: That's to make sure you can reach the higher cupboards in the plane.
Ellie: Right.
I'm 169 centimeters, I think.
What about qualifications?

content.cn_text: Greg：你需要证明你的英语水平不错。
content.en_text: Greg: You need to show that you have a good level of English.

content.cn_text: 包括书面和口语英语，还有数学。
content.en_text: That's written and spoken, and also maths.
Ellie: OK.

content.cn_text: 幸运的是，我这两门考试都通过了。
content.en_text: Well, I passed my exams in both those subjects, fortunately.

content.cn_text: Greg：如果你会说另一门语言，那会是优势。
content.en_text: Greg: And it's an advantage, if you can speak another language,

content.cn_text: 不过对客舱乘务员来说，这不是必须条件。
content.en_text: although for cabin crew, it's not essential.
Ellie: I can speak Spanish.
I did that at school until I was 16.
Greg: Excellent. That'll be very useful.
Ellie: And I'm pretty fit.
I don't have any medical problems.
Greg: OK.
Oh, and can you swim?
Ellie: Yes.

content.cn_text: Greg：很好，因为这是另一个要求。
content.en_text: Greg: Good, because that's another requirement.
Before you hear the rest of the conversation,

content.cn_text: 你有一些时间浏览第2页第6至第10题。
content.en_text: you have some time to look at questions 6 to 10 on page 2.

content.cn_text: 现在请听录音，并回答第6至第10题。
content.en_text: Now, listen and answer questions 6 to 10.

content.cn_text: Greg：如果你被录取，你会参加一个为期六周的培训课程。
content.en_text: Greg: Now, if you're accepted, you'll get a six week training course.
Ellie: Right.

content.cn_text: Greg：培训会涵盖工作的各个方面，包括你需要知道的所有基础内容，
content.en_text: Greg: So that'll cover all aspects of the job, all the basic things you need to know,

content.cn_text: 还有一些特殊情况，比如如果乘客突然
content.en_text: and then some special things, like what action to take if a passenger suddenly

content.cn_text: 在飞行中出现某种疾病，你该采取什么行动。
content.en_text: has some sort of illness while you're in the air, for example.
Ellie: Right.

content.cn_text: 我想你不能总指望飞机上有医生。
content.en_text: I suppose you can't always count on a doctor being on board.
Greg: No.

content.cn_text: 然后，你在培训期间还要做很多学习，
content.en_text: And then you'll have to do a lot of work during the training

content.cn_text: 了解乘客可能来自各种不同的文化，
content.en_text: on becoming aware of the variety of cultures that your passengers may come from,
and the implications of that.
Ellie: That's really interesting, actually.
OK.
Well, I'd definitely like to apply.

content.cn_text: 你到底在哪家航空公司工作？
content.en_text: What airline do you actually work for?

content.cn_text: Greg：是一家小航空公司，叫 Eurontas。
content.en_text: Greg: It's a small airline called Eurontas.
That's E-U-R-O-N-T-A-S.
Ellie: Is that N or M in the middle?
Greg: N for November.
Ellie: OK.
Greg: They're good people to work for.
Have a look at their website.

content.cn_text: 你可以从那里下载申请表。
content.en_text: You can download the application form from there.
Ellie: Right.

content.cn_text: 不过我没有太多相关经验。
content.en_text: I don't have much in the way of experience, though.

content.cn_text: Greg：那你离开学校后做过什么？
content.en_text: Greg: Well, what have you done since leaving school?

content.cn_text: Ellie：我在超市工作过一段时间。
content.en_text: Ellie: I worked in a supermarket for a bit.

content.cn_text: 在咨询台，我帮助处理顾客的问题。
content.en_text: On the information desk, I was helping deal with queries from customers.
Greg: OK, put that down.

content.cn_text: 事实上，这是这份工作最重要的方面之一。
content.en_text: That's one of the most important aspects of the job, in fact.
Ellie: Oh, right.

content.cn_text: 去年，我还作为一个团队的一员做过一些志愿工作。
content.en_text: And last year, I also did some voluntary work as part of a team.
Should I put that down, too?
Greg: Of course.

content.cn_text: 这也是他们会看重的东西，也就是能和他人合作。
content.en_text: That's something else they'll be looking for, being able to work with others.
Ellie: Right.

content.cn_text: Greg：很多航空公司会要求你自己付制服的钱。
content.en_text: Greg: And a lot of airlines expect you to pay for your own uniform.

content.cn_text: 但这家航空公司的好处是他们会为你提供制服。
content.en_text: But the good thing about this airline is that they provide it for you.
Ellie: Great.
Well, thanks so much, Greg.
I really...
That is the end of section one.

content.cn_text: 你现在有半分钟时间检查答案。
content.en_text: You'll now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 现在请翻到第3页第二部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section two on page three.

groups.desc:
Complete the notes below.
Write ONE WORD AND/OR A NUMBER for each answer.
groups.title: Questions 1–10

items.title: some responsibility for 1. __________ from sales during the flight
items.analysis: 答案解析：第1题问 some responsibility for ______ from sales during the flight，原文先说飞行中售卖物品，随后确认要 dealing with money，所以答案是 money。

items.title: must be over age 19 and at least 2. __________ cm tall
items.analysis: 答案解析：第2题问 at least ______ cm tall，原文说 minimum height is 168 centimeters，所以答案是 168。19 是年龄要求。

items.title: basic academic requirements: English and 3. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第3题问 basic academic requirements: English and ______，原文说 English 和 maths，所以答案是 maths。

items.title: at least one other 4. __________ is desirable
items.analysis: 答案解析：第4题问 at least one other ______ is desirable，原文说 another language is an advantage，所以答案是 language。

items.title: must be able to 5. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第5题问 must be able to ______，原文问 can you swim，并说这是 another requirement，所以答案是 swim。

items.title: what to do in case of 6. __________ during a flight
items.analysis: 答案解析：第6题问 what to do in case of ______ during a flight，原文说 if a passenger suddenly has some sort of illness，所以答案是 illness。

items.title: awareness of different 7. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第7题问 awareness of different ______，原文说 variety of cultures，所以答案是 cultures。

items.title: the airline is called 8. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第8题问 airline is called ______，原文说 called Eurontas，并拼写 E-U-R-O-N-T-A-S，所以答案是 EURONTAS。

items.title: working in a 9. __________ (voluntary work)
items.analysis: 答案解析：第9题问 working in a ______ (voluntary work)，原文说 voluntary work as part of a team，所以答案是 team。supermarket 是另一段工作经历。

items.title: you don’t have to buy a 10. __________
items.analysis: 答案解析：第10题问 you don't have to buy a ______，原文说这家航空公司 provide it for you，it 指 uniform，所以答案是 uniform。

groups.source_collect:

Job: cabin crew attendant
Duties include
• giving the safety demonstration
• some responsibility for $1$ from sales during the flight
• serving food
Requirements
• must be over age 19 and at least $2$ cm tall
• basic academic requirements: English and $3$
• at least one other $4$ is desirable
• must be able to $5$
Training will include
• what to do in case of $6$ during a flight
• awareness of different $7$
Application
• the airline is called $8$
• can download application form from website
mention experience of:
• dealing with questions from supermarket customers
• working in a $9$ (voluntary work)
Other information
• you don’t have to buy a $10$
